---
title: "Course content"
---

Course content is authored in independent collections, all built from the course library
[`libdpy`](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib):

- **lecture presentations** are QMD RevealJS decks; and
- **blog posts** are self-learning notebooks that can be read locally or opened in Colab.

Offerings reference each item independently by its unnumbered name.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->
## Lecture presentations

### differential privacy

- **DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.qmd) · apps: [Gaussian privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/), [Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)
- **Reconstruction Attacks** — [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.qmd) · apps: [Reconstruction 2-D slab](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-2d-slab/), [Reconstruction 3-D slabs](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)

### hypothesis testing

- **DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.qmd) · apps: [Gaussian privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/), [Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)

### reconstruction attacks

- **Reconstruction Attacks** — [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.qmd) · apps: [Reconstruction 2-D slab](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-2d-slab/), [Reconstruction 3-D slabs](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)

## Blog posts

### differential privacy

- **DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb)
- **Privacy Auditing** — [Privacy Auditing](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb)
- **Reconstruction Attacks** — [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb)

### hypothesis testing

- **DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb)

### privacy auditing

- **Privacy Auditing** — [Privacy Auditing](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb)

### reconstruction attacks

- **Reconstruction Attacks** — [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb)
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->

See the [schedule](schedule.qmd) for the current term's selected content.
